🌊 SpiritPool Settings

Manage your data collection preferences and privacy

Site Collection

Choose which sites SpiritPool monitors. Disabling a site also clears its cached data.

Cached Data

Signals are stored locally on your device, separated by domain.

Data Log

Recent signals collected by the extension.

Loading...

Privacy

Data Minimisation

SpiritPool only collects structured job listing metadata from allowlisted sites. We extract the minimum fields needed for staffing intelligence analysis.

What is collected

  • Job title, company name, location
  • Salary range (when displayed)
  • Posting date, applicant count
  • Store ratings and review counts (Google Maps)
  • Urgency/repost badges

What is NEVER collected

  • Passwords, cookies, or authentication tokens
  • Your browsing history beyond the 5 allowlisted sites
  • Personal information (name, email, resume, applications)
  • Data from any site not on the allowlist

Data Storage

All data is stored locally in your browser's extension storage, separated by domain. Data is not sent to any server until you see backend integration enabled in a future version. You can export or delete your data at any time.

Open Source

The full source code of this extension is available for inspection. We believe in transparency.
